ItacPersonItem.Notes: Vincenzo di Bologna became President of theStella Academy in Messina See Placido Samperi, Iconologia della Gloriosa Vergine, Messina, 1644, p. 136 (BL Shelfmark: 664.e.8.)
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
